offer: For logistics carriers managing 5-15 vehicles, inefficient tracking of vehicle maintenance causes unexpected breakdowns. We automate maintenance tracking instead of manual tracking via spreadsheets.
problem: Inefficient tracking of vehicle maintenance leading to unexpected breakdowns.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for logistics carriers
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to logistics carriers with demo video
Community forums for sharing tools and tips
try_it: Let users try manual entry of maintenance records on 1-3 vehicles
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path

Produce a short demo video of manual workflow
Offer early access to first 10 users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as templates for easy access
Set default reminder schedules for maintenance
Allow CSV import for existing vehicle data
Enable one-click export of maintenance reports
Streamline onboarding process with fewer steps
